response.justification: The candidate has strong software development experience but lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows, which is a mandatory skill for this role. While their background includes C and C++ components, their focus has been on other languages (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang, JavaScript) in financial and non-financial domains. They do not meet the core technical or domain expertise requirements.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development experience
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills (TDD, CI/CD)
Fluent English and prior work in financial-sector-adjacent roles (e.g., RIDE Capital)
concerns: No demonstrated 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows platform
No direct experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases
Lacks domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment Banking
